name: Nasi Goreng (Fried Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ham into strips 1-inch long by 1/8-inch wide.
2. Beat the eggs.
3. Heat a skillet and grease it with a few drops of oil.
4. Make four thin omelets from four eggs; set aside for garnish.
5. Add two tablespoons of oil to the skillet and make a thicker omelet from the remaining two eggs, slicing into 1/2-inch squares.
6. Add the oil and fry onion and garlic for 2 minutes.
7. Add pork and stir until cooked.
8. Add shrimp, omelet squares, soy sauce, salt, pepper, and rice; mix together over low heat for about 10 minutes.
9. Heat one tablespoon of oil in a heavy frying pan over medium-high heat.
10. Add the dried onion flakes and stir until brown and crisp.
11. Garnish with sliced omelet, chilies, ham, crab meat, celery, and onion flakes.
